name: git-guard
description: PreToolUse(Bash) guard that denies force-push, force-with-lease, refspec-force, and hook-bypass git operations. Catches `git push --force`, `git push -f`, `git push <remote> +<ref>`, `git push --force-with-lease`, `git commit --no-verify`, `git merge --no-verify`, `git rebase --no-verify`. Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_GIT_GUARD=1.
